title: Convex Hull Algorithm
description: Find the convex hull of a set of points
mermaid:
graph TD
    A1[Input: Set of points P] --> B1[Sort points P by x-coordinate]
    style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

    B1 --> C1[Initialize: Lower Hull L = [], Upper Hull U = []]
    style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

    C1 --> D1[For each point p in sorted P]
    style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

    D1 --> E1{While L contains at least 2 points AND last two points of L form a non-left turn with p}
    style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

    E1 -- Yes --> F1[Remove last point from L]
    style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

    F1 --> E1
    E1 -- No --> G1[Append p to L]
    style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

    G1 --> H1[For each point p in sorted P (in reverse order)]
    style H1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

    H1 --> I1{While U contains at least 2 points AND last two points of U form a non-left turn with p}
    style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000

    I1 -- Yes --> J1[Remove last point from U]
    style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

    J1 --> I1
    I1 -- No --> K1[Append p to U]
    style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

    K1 --> L1[Remove first and last point from L and U (avoid duplicates)]
    style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

    L1 --> M1[Concatenate L and U to form Convex Hull CH]
    style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

    M1 --> N1[Output: Convex Hull CH]
    style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: /"For each point p in sorted P"/
/"For each point p in sorted P (in reverse order)"/
/"Concatenate L and U to form Convex Hull CH"/
/"Remove first and last point from L and U (avoid duplicates)"/
source_text: Source information to be added - please specify the book, paper, or reference material used by the LLM to generate this flowchart.
